title: phyllanthus virgatus var. gardnerianus
intro: Phyllanthus virgatus var. gardnerianus, also known as the Indian gooseberry or amlaki, is a plant species native to tropical regions. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Phyllanthus virgatus var. gardnerianus include reducing inflammation, improving liver function, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or extract, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine to support overall health and well-being.
